title: CachingStore<S>: implement struct + SecretStore
description: Implement CachingStore<S: SecretStore> in secretx-cache/src/lib.rs. Struct fields: inner: Arc<S>, ttl: Duration, cache: Arc<tokio::sync::Mutex<HashMap<String,CachedEntry>>>. CachedEntry: bytes: Zeroizing<Vec<u8>>, fetched_at: Instant. Constructor: CachingStore::new(inner: Arc<S>, ttl: Duration). SecretStore impl: get() checks TTL — if hit, copies bytes into SecretValue and returns; if miss, fetches from inner (no lock held), then re-locks to insert. TTL=0 short-circuits to inner.get() with no caching. put() copies bytes before consuming value, calls inner.put(), on success updates cache. refresh() calls inner.refresh(), updates cache. NEVER hold Mutex across .await. Zeroing is automatic via Zeroizing<Vec<u8>> drop.
